articles.description: The Health and Human Services Department (HHS) and Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) on Thursday announced the formation of a new expert advisory panel that will make recommendations on how to modernize the U.S. health care system. The 18-member Healthcare Advisory Committee will be tasked with advising HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.…

analysis.summary: The HHS and CMS announced the formation of an 18-member Healthcare Advisory Committee on Thursday. The committee will be tasked with advising HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and making recommendations on modernizing the U.S. health care system.
facts: The Health and Human Services Department (HHS) and Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) announced the formation of a new expert advisory panel.
The announcement was made on Thursday.
The new panel is called the Healthcare Advisory Committee.
The Healthcare Advisory Committee has 18 members.
The committee will be tasked with advising HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
The committee will make recommendations on how to modernize the U.S. health care system.

stories.headline: D.H.S. Funding Lapse Leads to Longest Partial Shutdown in History

articles.title: D.H.S. Funding Lapse Leads to Longest Partial Shutdown in History
articles.description: If the shutdown continues after this weekend, it will be longer than any previous shutdown, partial or full.

analysis.summary: A partial shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security has resulted in the longest partial shutdown in U.S. history. The shutdown is ongoing, with its duration already surpassing previous records.
facts: A funding lapse at the Department of Homeland Security led to a partial shutdown.
If the shutdown continues after the referenced weekend, it will be longer than any previous shutdown, partial or full.

articles.title: Completed ‘Hail Mary’
articles.description: Movies too often use outer space as nothing more than a convenient setting for battles, explosions, and laser fights. The fabulously entertaining science-fiction movie Project Hail Mary offers something wholly different. analysis.summary: Project Hail Mary is a science-fiction movie described by the Washington Examiner as offering a different take on space films, focusing on friendship, spiritual growth, and intergalactic empathy rather than action.
facts: Project Hail Mary is a science-fiction movie.
The article was published by the Washington Examiner.

stories.headline: The cultural dominance of Chuck Norris

articles.title: The cultural dominance of Chuck Norris
articles.description: The amazing persistence of the legend of Chuck Norris, who died on March 19 at the age of 86, says something profound about American popular culture. At the time of his death, Norris had long ceased being a major movie star — he had not made a high-profile theatrical feature since The Expendables 2 in […]

analysis.summary: Chuck Norris died on March 19 at the age of 86. Despite no longer being a major movie star, his cultural legend persisted. His last notable theatrical appearance was in The Expendables 2.
facts: Chuck Norris died on March 19.
Chuck Norris was 86 years old at the time of his death.
Chuck Norris had not made a high-profile theatrical feature since The Expendables 2.
